arts.sum: Given the chance to rest and recover by not reporting for duty with South Korea, Min-jae opted to attend team training with Bayern Munich this week, rather than continue to rest. Now, it looks like Min-jae will anchor the backline this weekend vs.

arts.sum: Bild reports that the current tendency is that Thomas Müller will leave the club at the end of the season when his contract expires. Over the international break, there were two…

arts.ttl: Arsenal will try to sign Bayern Munich’s Leroy Sané for free this summer
arts.sum: As reported by Christian Falk, Arsenal are interested in signing Leroy Sané this summer as a free agent. The Germany winger’s current deal expires this summer, and there are no…

arts.ttl: “Really good chance” – Alan Shearer tips Harry Kane to make England return with surprise Premier League club
arts.sum: Speculation is mounting over Harry Kane’s future at Bayern Munich, with Liverpool emerging as a potential destination if the England captain decides to return to the Premier League. It has been recently reported that the Three Lions striker is eyeing a Premier League return and is tempted by the Slot’s project at Liverpool. Former England […] The post “Really good chance” – Alan Shearer tips Harry Kane to make England return with surprise Premier League club appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich hoping Tottenham Hotspur uses purchase option for Mathys Tel; Dušan Vlahović out at Juventus?; Xabi Alonso to replace Pep Guardiola at Manchester City?; FC Barcelona attempting to steal Real Madrid target; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are expecting that Tottenham Hotspur trigger the €60m clause to make Mathys Tel’s loan permanent so they can sign a striker in the summer transfer window . Bayern Munich ’s loan of Mathys Tel to Tottenham Hotspur has always felt like it has the potential to become permanent — and as it turns out, that is exactly what the Bavarians are banking on per Bild:

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen’s Patrik Schick to challenge Harry Kane for the Torjägerkanone
arts.sum: I believe in it a bit - But above all, we want to put pressure on Bayern. Harry Kane is not exactly hitting the same goal scoring heights he did in his first season at Bayern Munich, but he’s still a capable goal scorer for he has 21 goals in the Bundesliga so far.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend says team will enjoy underdog role vs. Inter Milan in Champions League
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge might have a unique perspective on things ahead his club’s Champions League showdown with Inter Milan . Rummenigge, whose playing history includes stints with both clubs, is anticipating a great set of games in the Champions League quarterfinals.

arts.ttl: A year on after rejecting Bayern Munich, could Ralf Rangnick join Bundesliga rivals Borussia Dortmund?
arts.sum: Bild reports that there is a possibility that Ralf Rangnick could replace Sebastian Kehl and become the new sporting director of Borussia Dortmund in the summer. Bild reports, as captured by Get German Football News, that the current Austria manager could join the club as a sporting director:

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show Season 4, Episode 36: How does Bayern Munich move on without Alphonso Davies, Dayot Upamecano; Transfer rumor roundup — there are so many; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich ’s preparation for the stretch run of the season hit some snags over the course of the last week thanks to some very untimely injuries. Let’s talk about all of that and more in this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show:

arts.ttl: Bavarian Fashion Works: More details on Bayern Munich’s next Oktoberfest kit emerge
arts.sum: The shirt is said to be inspired by traditional dirndl designs. Quite fitting, since the last Oktoberfest kit was inspired by the traditional Lederhosen look of Bavarian men.
